issuetype.description: A work container is a task formulation that can be completed by a specified time with defined results and effort. It can consist of several individual work packages and their related tasks.

comments.body:
Hi [~mrudolph] / [~dkvicala] / [~pkalivoda] / [~mboenisch]
As of today checking, no shortage material for this NPI. However, PCBA structure in PDS001 is still under status 10.
In case of any further change with the bill of material, pls alert me.

 !PCBA Structure sts 10.png|thumbnail!
[~rpilc]   can you please release R+D in D3
Stencil BAG-T460 ordered
{color:#57d9a3}*stencil delivered*{color}

[~mrudolph]  Hello 

today we wanted to make NPI on the line but we found out that we are missing material 290723
system shows 8 - reality 4
[~mrudolph]  the question is can we make two full pieces and the rest without components.
we will feed the missing components manually after delivery.
I mean that there will only be two functional pieces

or we wait until the material is available ?

[~thhoang]  How quickly can we deliver the component to Trutnov?

[~duonguyen] - 15,000pcs of material should arrive to Trutnov on 5.1.

Is it possible to speed-up this delivery? Or the 2nd option is to get it from VN1, there is 8372pcs on stock.

Could you review that possibilities? Thank you
[~mrudolph] - We'll produce all we can and try to get missing material ASAP

Hi [~dkvicala] [~mrudolph] 

Transistor #290723 is a Nexperia part currently facing supply issues. There is no stock available on the open market, and we are unable to secure stock from supplier in the short term. For stock in VN1, this can't be shared. For main line, we are working on sourcing from brokers. 

For this build, could we consider using {*}alternative #70206765{*}? Please check and advise.

Hi all,

the discontinued transistor #290723 is part of the DDE-5171 project I'm working on. I'm currently discussing how to proceed from here. In my opinion, it makes more sense to first implement the change to the Nexperia transistor and then qualify the PCBA.

[~duonguyen] 

[~dkvicala]

Hello everyone,
due to the discontinuation of the Nexperia transistor (which is also used in this PCBA) and the current component shortage, we stop our activities. I will initiate a new QA ExpressOPS as soon as the redesign with an alternative to the Nexperia transistor is complete.

Thank you!
[~mrudolph] - Understood. We've produced 5pcs. Do you want to send them?
[~mrudolph] - parts were handed-over to Libor Rousek, after discussion w/ him

comments.body:
Hi Rudolph Marvin / Kvicala Daniel / Kalivoda Pavel / Boenisch Milan
As of today checking, no shortage material for this NPI. However, PCBA structure in PDS001 is still under status 10.
In case of any further change with the bill of material, pls alert me.
Pilc Richard   can you please release R+D in D3
Stencil BAG-T460 ordered
stencil delivered

Rudolph Marvin  Hello 

today we wanted to make NPI on the line but we found out that we are missing material 290723
system shows 8 - reality 4
Rudolph Marvin  the question is can we make two full pieces and the rest without components.
we will feed the missing components manually after delivery.
I mean that there will only be two functional pieces

or we wait until the material is available ?

Kaitlyn Hoang Thi Ai Linh  How quickly can we deliver the component to Trutnov?

Nguyen Duong Thuc Anh - 15,000pcs of material should arrive to Trutnov on 5.1.

Is it possible to speed-up this delivery? Or the 2nd option is to get it from VN1, there is 8372pcs on stock.

Could you review that possibilities? Thank you
Rudolph Marvin - We'll produce all we can and try to get missing material ASAP

Hi Kvicala Daniel Rudolph Marvin 

Transistor #290723 is a Nexperia part currently facing supply issues. There is no stock available on the open market, and we are unable to secure stock from supplier in the short term. For stock in VN1, this can't be shared. For main line, we are working on sourcing from brokers. 

For this build, could we consider using alternative #70206765? Please check and advise.

Hi all,

the discontinued transistor #290723 is part of the DDE-5171 project I'm working on. I'm currently discussing how to proceed from here. In my opinion, it makes more sense to first implement the change to the Nexperia transistor and then qualify the PCBA.

Nguyen Duong Thuc Anh 

Kvicala Daniel

Hello everyone,
due to the discontinuation of the Nexperia transistor (which is also used in this PCBA) and the current component shortage, we stop our activities. I will initiate a new QA ExpressOPS as soon as the redesign with an alternative to the Nexperia transistor is complete.

Thank you!
Rudolph Marvin - Understood. We've produced 5pcs. Do you want to send them?
Rudolph Marvin - parts were handed-over to Libor Rousek, after discussion w/ him
